New Deals.

Gopher Deals are exclusively available to registered Gopher users.

1

Browse deals from multiple local merchants and service providers

Open the app and browse deals right on the home page. Search by location or keyword to find exactly what you're after.

2

Redeem directly from merchants and service providers

Found something you love? Redeem it conveniently and directly from the merchant or service provider — no middleman, no markup.

3

Seamless assistance from a Gopher

All deals have a link for immediate assistance. Whether delivery, assembly, or something else, we've got you covered.

Why neighbors love deals

This isn't another delivery app.

— it's your whole town, on demand
🍔🌮🍜🍕🍣🥡🍩

We make it make sense — and cents

Most mom & pop restaurants, family kitchens, food trucks, and hidden gems never signed up for the giant marketplaces — it just doesn't make sense when it's not their core business. Gopher Deals is here to make it cost effective and easy when it does.

🛵
🧹🔧🪛🌱🎨🪜🔌

Amazing service offers from local Pros — with zero hassle

No more calls, texts, sourcing, and haggling just for a service. Keyword-search the service you're looking for and, when you find it, one click links you with the provider to get you scheduled — timely.

Last-Mile, Handled

Delivered, carried in & set up

Don't have a way to pick up an item? Don't want it dumped on the porch? With some deals you can request a Gopher to bring it to you, assemble it and/or install it on the spot — the heavy lifting is part of the deal.

Real Ownership

Your Gopher owns the job — no pass-offs

Hit a snag? There's no call-center maze and no finger-pointing between companies. The same person who accepted the job makes it right, instantly. One name, one face, full accountability.

Booking a Pro, Reinvented

Who knew finding help
would be this easy.

You've been there before when asking for help with a service: calls, texts, haggling and no-shows. Often times you don't even know anything about the worker. Fortunately with Gopher's Service Provider Deals, we've solved for that!

Top-rated

We've given our best performing, highest rated workers the ability to offer our customers popular services for a great price.

Hassle Free

No matter what the offer, you'll know the full details and price up front. Find one you like and you're a couple clicks away from a Done Deal.

Your Time

Scheduling is instant and effortless. No need to stress on the one thing we never get back — time.

Real deals. Real neighbors. Really delivered.
